script.name: plugin.logistics.menu
script.sourceplaintext:
* no event, must be from a hotkey, so launch the menu if ! $a.event START [PLAYERSHIP] ->open menu script: script=plugin.logistics.menu, value=null return null end
*do if $a.event != [MEvent.IsDisabled] *write to player logbook: printf: type=[Log.Debug], fmt='Logistics, Obj=%s, Event=%s, Data=%s', $a.obj, $a.event, $a.data, null, null
$current.tab = get global variable: name='menu.tab' $loaded.network.name = get global variable: name='menu.network'
* make sure the data exists $page.id = get global variable: name='pageid.guilds' $Guilds.Data = get global variable: name='guilds.data' $logistics.data = $Guilds.Data['logistics'] if not $logistics.data $logistics.data = table alloc $Guilds.Data['logistics'] = $logistics.data end $table.networks = $logistics.data['networks'] if not $table.networks $table.networks = table alloc $logistics.data['networks'] = $table.networks end do if $loaded.network.name $network.data = $table.networks[$loaded.network.name]
if $a.event == [MEvent.Start] if $a.data if $table.networks[$a.data] set global variable: name='menu.network' value=$a.data $loaded.network.name = $a.data gosub sub.BuildMainMenu return $input end end gosub sub.BuildProfileMenu return $input
else if $a.event == [MEvent.Hotkey] @ $ret = [THIS] -> call script lib.cycrow.table.process : Object=$a.obj Event=$a.event Data=$a.data Table Data=null Sort Data=null do if $ret return $ret
else if $a.event == [MEvent.Search] $menu.id = $a.data[0] $array = array alloc: size=0 if $menu.id == 'logistics.mainmenu' if $current.tab == 1 append 'docks' to array $array append 'factories' to array $array append 'complex' to array $array else if $current.tab == 2 append 'ships' to array $array end else if $menu.id == 'ship.menu' append 'ships' to array $array else if $menu.id == 'station.menu' append 'docks' to array $array append 'factories' to array $array append 'complex' to array $array end $ret = [FALSE]
$i = size of array $array while $i dec $i = $table = $array[$i] @ $data = [THIS] -> call script plugin.logistics.tabledata : Menu=$menu.id Table=$table Network=$loaded.network.name $table = $table.networks[$loaded.network.name] @ if [THIS] -> call script lib.cycrow.table.process : Object=$a.obj Event=$a.event Data=$a.data Table Data=$data Sort Data=$table $ret = [TRUE] break end end
if $ret gosub sub.BuildMenuFromID return $menu else $value = $a.data[1] $var = sprintf: fmt='search.%s', $menu.id, null, null, null, null if not $value remove key $var from table $logistics.data else if not get length of string $value remove key $var from table $logistics.data else $logistics.data[$var] = $value end gosub sub.BuildMenuFromID return $menu
end
else if $a.event == [MEvent.TabChanged] $menu.id = $a.data[0] $selection = $a.data[1] if $menu.id == 'logistics.mainmenu' set global variable: name='menu.tab' value=$selection $current.tab = $selection gosub sub.BuildMainMenu return $menu end
else if $a.event == [MEvent.Update] $menu.id = $a.data[0] if $menu.id == 'logistics.mainmenu' gosub sub.BuildMainMenu return $menu end
else if $a.event == [MEvent.Context] @ $ret = [THIS] -> call script lib.cycrow.table.process : Object=$a.obj Event=$a.event Data=$a.data Table Data=null Sort Data=null do if $ret return $ret
gosub sub.SplitMenuData if $menu.id == 'logistics.menu' if $value == 'profile.edit' set global variable: name='menu.network' value=$selection $loaded.network.name = $selection gosub sub.BuildMainMenu return $input else if $value == 'profile.delete' $read.text = read text: page=$page.id id=4214 $text = read text: page=$page.id id=4217 $input = create input: id='delete.network', message box=$text, title=$read.text, buttons=[Buttons.YesNo], icon=66, default button=[Button.Yes] set global variable: name='menu.network' value=$selection return $input end else if $menu.id == 'logistics.mainmenu' if $value == 'station.edit' $station = $selection set global variable: name='menu.station' value=$selection gosub sub.BuildEditStation return $input else if $value == 'station.delete' set global variable: name='menu.station' value=$selection $read.text = read text: page=$page.id id=4215 $text = read text: page=$page.id id=4218 $input = create input: id='remove.station', message box=$text, title=$read.text, buttons=[Buttons.YesNo], icon=66, default button=[Button.Yes] return $input else if $value == 'ship.delete' set global variable: name='menu.ship' value=$selection $read.text = read text: page=$page.id id=4216 $text = read text: page=$page.id id=4219 $input = create input: id='remove.ship', message box=$text, title=$read.text, buttons=[Buttons.YesNo], icon=66, default button=[Button.Yes] return $input end else if $menu.id == 'station.editmenu' if $value == 'delete' $station = get global variable: name='menu.station' gosub sub.GetStationData if $selection.type == 'export' $value = $data[3][$selection] $table = $data[3] remove key $selection from table $table else $value = $data[2][$selection] $table = $data[2] remove key $selection from table $table end
gosub sub.BuildEditStation $input = create input return value: update menu=$menu return $input end end
else if $a.event == [MEvent.Select] gosub sub.SplitMenuData if $menu.id == 'station.editmenu' gosub sub.GetStationData if $selection == 'clear' $table = table alloc $data[2] = $table $table = table alloc $data[3] = $table else if $selection == 'default' gosub sub.SetDefaultWares end play sample [Sound.Success] gosub sub.BuildMenuFromID $input = create input return value: update menu=$menu return $input end
else if $a.event == 'add.import' OR $a.event == 'add.export' $menu.id = $a.event gosub sub.BuildMenuFromID return $input
else if $a.event == [MEvent.HeadingClick] gosub sub.SplitMenuData @ $data = [THIS] -> call script plugin.logistics.tabledata : Menu=$menu.id Table=$selection Network=$loaded.network.name if $data @ if [THIS] -> call script lib.cycrow.table.process : Object=$a.obj Event=$a.event Data=$a.data Table Data=$data Sort Data=$logistics.data gosub sub.BuildMenuFromID return $menu end end
else if $a.event == [MEvent.Switch] gosub sub.SplitMenuData if $menu.id == 'station.editmenu' if $selection == 'prio' $station = get global variable: name='menu.station' inc $value = gosub sub.GetStationData $data[1] = $value end end
else if $a.event == [MEvent.TradeBarCh] gosub sub.SplitMenuData if $menu.id == 'station.editmenu' $station = get global variable: name='menu.station' gosub sub.GetStationData skip if $value $value = -1 if $selection.type == 'export' $data[3][$selection] = $value else $data[2][$selection] = $value end gosub sub.BuildEditStation return $menu end
else if $a.event == [MEvent.Returned] $menu.id = $a.data[0] $selection = $a.data[1] $value = $a.data[2] if $menu.id == 'logistics.menu' if $selection == 'new.profile' if is datatype[ $value ] == DATATYPE_STRING gosub sub.CreateNetwork $table.networks[$value] = $network $network['name'] = $value gosub sub.BuildProfileMenu return $menu end else if $selection == 'delete.network' $loaded.network.name = get global variable: name='menu.network' set global variable: name='menu.network' value=null if $value == [Button.Yes] $table.networks[$loaded.network.name]['deleted'] = [TRUE] remove key $loaded.network.name from table $table.networks gosub sub.BuildProfileMenu return $menu end else if $selection == 'logistics.mainmenu' gosub sub.BuildProfileMenu return $menu end else if $menu.id == 'logistics.mainmenu' if $selection == 'station.menu' if $value -> exists $table.stations = $table.networks[$loaded.network.name]['stations'] $data = array alloc: size=4 $data[0] = $value $data[1] = 3 if $value -> is of class Factory $station = $value gosub sub.SetDefaultWares else $table = table alloc $data[2] = $table $table = table alloc $data[3] = $table end $table.stations[$value] = $data gosub sub.BuildMainMenu return $menu end else if $selection == 'remove.station' $station = get global variable: name='menu.station' set global variable: name='menu.station' value=null if $value == [Button.Yes] $data = $table.networks[$loaded.network.name]['stations'] remove key $station from table $data gosub sub.BuildMainMenu return $menu end else if $selection == 'remove.ship' $ship = get global variable: name='menu.ship' set global variable: name='menu.ship' value=null if $value == [Button.Yes] $data = $table.networks[$loaded.network.name]['ships'] remove key $ship from table $data gosub sub.BuildMainMenu return $menu end else if $selection == 'station.editmenu' $station = get global variable: name='menu.station' gosub sub.BuildMainMenu return $menu else if $selection == 'ship.menu' if $value -> exists $table.ships = $table.networks[$loaded.network.name]['ships'] $data = array alloc: size=5 $data[0] = $value $data[1] = 3 $data[2] = 30 $data[3] = 'all' $data[4] = null $table.ships[$value] = $data gosub sub.BuildMainMenu return $menu end end else if $menu.id == 'station.editmenu' if $selection == 'add.import' if $value $station = get global variable: name='menu.station' gosub sub.GetStationData $data = $data[2] $data[$value] = -1 gosub sub.BuildEditStation return $menu end else if $selection == 'add.export' if $value $station = get global variable: name='menu.station' gosub sub.GetStationData $data = $data[3] $data[$value] = -1 gosub sub.BuildEditStation return $menu end end end
else if $a.event == 'add.station' gosub sub.BuildStationMenu return $input
else if $a.event == 'add.ship' gosub sub.BuildShipMenu return $input
else if $a.event == 'create.new' $read.text = read text: page=$page.id id=4201 $input = create input: id='new.profile', user input=Var/String, refobj=null, description=$read.text, without sector=null, filterclass=null, racemask=null, flags=null, default=null return $input
else if $a.event == [MEvent.Finished] set global variable: name='menu.network' value=null set global variable: name='menu.tab' value=null set global variable: name='menu.station' value=null set global variable: name='menu.ship' value=null end
return null
sub.BuildMenuFromID: if $menu.id == 'ship.menu' gosub sub.BuildShipMenu else if $menu.id == 'logistics.mainmenu' gosub sub.BuildMainMenu else if $menu.id == 'station.menu' gosub sub.BuildStationMenu else if $menu.id == 'station.editmenu' gosub sub.BuildEditStation else if $menu.id == 'add.export' $is.export = [TRUE] gosub sub.CreateWareMenu else if $menu.id == 'add.import' $is.export = [FALSE] gosub sub.CreateWareMenu end endsub
sub.SetDefaultWares: $table = table alloc $t = $station ->get primary resources table $ware = get next key: table=$t key=null while $ware $ware.flags = get ware flags: ware=$ware skip if $ware.flags & ( [WareType.Fluff] | [WareType.Luxury] | [WareType.NoPrice] | [WareType.Upgrade] | [WareType.Equipment] ) $table[$ware] = -1 $ware = get next key: table=$t key=$ware end $data[2] = $table
$table = table alloc $t = $station ->get products table: include equipment=[FALSE] $ware = get next key: table=$t key=null while $ware $ware.flags = get ware flags: ware=$ware skip if $ware.flags & ( [WareType.Fluff] | [WareType.Luxury] | [WareType.NoPrice] | [WareType.Upgrade] | [WareType.Equipment] ) $table[$ware] = -1 $ware = get next key: table=$t key=$ware end $data[3] = $table endsub
sub.GetWareTable: if $data if $is.export $table = $data[3] else $table = $data[2] end end
if $station -> is of class Factory if $is.export $ware.table = $station -> get products $ware.table = convert array to table: $ware.table, increment=[FALSE] else $ware.table = $station ->get primary resources table end else $ware.table = $station ->get station tradeable ware table end
$table.new = table alloc $key = get next key: table=$ware.table key=null while $key $ware = $key $key = get next key: table=$ware.table key=$key
$ware.flags = get ware flags: ware=$ware do if $ware.flags & ( [WareType.Dummy] | [WareType.NoPrice] | [WareType.Equipment] | [WareType.Fluff] | [WareType.Upgrade] | [WareType.Luxury] ) continue if $data if $table do if $table[$ware] continue end end $table.new[$ware] = $ware.table[$ware] end $ware.table = $table.new endsub
sub.CreateWareMenu: $station = get global variable: name='menu.station' gosub sub.GetStationData gosub sub.GetWareTable
$menu = create custom menu array
if $is.export $search.value = $logistics.data['search.add.export'] else $search.value = $logistics.data['search.add.import'] end
$added = 0 $sorted.array = sort table keys: table=$ware.table $i = 0 $size = size of array $sorted.array while $i < $size $ware = $sorted.array[$i] inc $i =
if $search.value $text = sprintf: fmt='%s', $ware, null, null, null, null skip if case insensitive string match, is $search.value in $text continue end
$text.cols = array alloc: size=3 $text = create custom menu column string, position=0 length=-70 right=[FALSE] colour=null text=$ware $text.cols[0] = $text $text = get transport class of ware $ware $text = get short transport class name: class=$text $text = create custom menu column string, position=-1 length=40 right=[TRUE] colour=null text=$text $text.cols[1] = $text $text = get volume of ware $ware $text = convert number $text to string $text = create custom menu column string, position=-40 length=30 right=[TRUE] colour=null text=$text $text.cols[2] = $text $voice = get text id: ware=$ware inc $voice = set menu line option: $menu, voiced description page=17, id=$voice set menu line option: $menu, video display ware=$ware add custom menu item to array $menu: text=$text.cols returnvalue=$ware inc $added = end
if not $added $read.text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=689 add non selectable menu item: $menu, text=$read.text end
set menu option: $menu, icon=3 set menu option: $menu, global hotkey=[Key.Identity], id=$ware set menu option: $menu, allow searching=[TRUE]
if $is.export $read.text = read text: page=$page.id id=4225 $ret = 'add.export' else $read.text = read text: page=$page.id id=4224 $ret = 'add.import' end $input = create input: id=$ret menu=$menu title=$read.text description=$station callback=null endsub
sub.SplitMenuData: $menu.id = $a.data[0] $selection = $a.data[1] $value = $a.data[2] if is datatype[ $selection ] == DATATYPE_ARRAY $selection.type = $selection[0] $selection = $selection[1] else $selection.type = null end endsub
sub.BuildProfileMenu: $menu = create custom menu array
set menu option: $menu, icon=17
$read.text = read text: page=$page.id id=4202 $text = sprintf: fmt='[%s]', $read.text, null, null, null, null $text = create custom menu column string, position=0 length=0 right=[FALSE] colour=[MenuColour.White] text=$text add custom menu item to array $menu: text=$text nextinput='create.new' value=null
if size of table $table.networks add section to custom menu: $menu $sorted.array = sort table keys by value: table=$table.networks
$i = 0 $size = size of array $sorted.array while $i < $size $network.name = $sorted.array[$i] $network = $table.networks[$network.name] inc $i = $context = create context menu $read.text = read text: page=$page.id id=4211 add context menu entry: menu=$context, text=$read.text, icon=65, returnvalue='profile.edit', hotkey=null, disabled=null $read.text = read text: page=$page.id id=4214 add context menu entry: menu=$context, text=$read.text, icon=66, returnvalue='profile.delete', hotkey=null, disabled=null $read.text = read text: page=$page.id id=4200 add context menu global info line: menu=$context, name=$read.text, value=$network.name $ret = create menu return value: context menu, id=$network.name, menu=$context, dynamic=[FALSE] add custom menu item to array $menu: text=$network.name returnvalue=$ret
$text.cols = array alloc: size=4 $text = create custom menu string type icon: type=Free Argon Trading Station $text = create custom menu column string, position=30 length=0 right=[FALSE] colour=[MenuColour.Grey] text=$text $text.cols[0] = $text $read.text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=1102457 $text = create custom menu column string, position=45 length=0 right=[FALSE] colour=[MenuColour.Grey] text=$read.text $text.cols[1] = $text $text = create custom menu column string, position=100 length=0 right=[FALSE] colour=[MenuColour.Grey] text=':' $text.cols[2] = $text $table = $network['stations'] $text = size of table $table $text = convert number $text to string $text = create custom menu column string, position=110 length=40 right=[TRUE] colour=[MenuColour.Grey] text=$text $text.cols[3] = $text add extra select line: menu=$menu, text=$text.cols
$text.cols = array alloc: size=4 $text = create custom menu string type icon: type=Mercury $text = create custom menu column string, position=30 length=0 right=[FALSE] colour=[MenuColour.Grey] text=$text $text.cols[0] = $text $read.text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=683 $text = create custom menu column string, position=45 length=0 right=[FALSE] colour=[MenuColour.Grey] text=$read.text $text.cols[1] = $text $text = create custom menu column string, position=100 length=0 right=[FALSE] colour=[MenuColour.Grey] text=':' $text.cols[2] = $text $table = $network['ships'] $text = size of table $table $text = convert number $text to string $text = create custom menu column string, position=110 length=40 right=[TRUE] colour=[MenuColour.Grey] text=$text $text.cols[3] = $text add extra select line: menu=$menu, text=$text.cols end end
$read.text = read text: page=$page.id id=4200 $input = create input: id='logistics.menu' menu=$menu title=$read.text description=[PLAYERSHIP] callback=null endsub
sub.CreateNetwork: $network = table alloc $table = table alloc $network['stations'] = $table $table = table alloc $network['ships'] = $table endsub
sub.BuildOverview: set menu option: $menu, no select lines=[TRUE]
$table = table alloc $table.imports = table alloc $table.exports = table alloc
$table = table alloc $table.stations = $table.networks[$loaded.network.name]['stations'] if $table.stations $station = get next key: table=$table.stations key=null while $station $data = $table.stations[$station][2] $ware = get next key: table=$data key=null while $ware $ware.amt = $table.imports[$ware] skip if $ware.amt $ware.amt = 0 inc $ware.amt = $table.imports[$ware] = $ware.amt $tmp = $table[$ware] skip if $tmp $tmp = 0 $ware.amt = $station -> get true amount of ware $ware in cargo bay $tmp = $tmp + $ware.amt $table[$ware] = $tmp $ware = get next key: table=$data key=$ware end
$data = $table.stations[$station][3] $ware = get next key: table=$data key=null while $ware $ware.amt = $table.exports[$ware] skip if $ware.amt $ware.amt = 0 inc $ware.amt = $table.exports[$ware] = $ware.amt $tmp = $table[$ware] skip if $tmp $tmp = 0 $ware.amt = $station -> get true amount of ware $ware in cargo bay $tmp = $tmp + $ware.amt $table[$ware] = $tmp $ware = get next key: table=$data key=$ware end
$station = get next key: table=$table.stations key=$station end end
$text.cols = array alloc: size=4 $read.text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=2163 $text = create custom menu column string, position=0 length=300 right=[FALSE] colour=null text=$read.text $text.cols[0] = $text $read.text = read text: page=$page.id id=4209 $text = create custom menu column string, position=300 length=60 right=[TRUE] colour=null text=$read.text $text.cols[1] = $text $read.text = read text: page=$page.id id=4210 $text = create custom menu column string, position=360 length=60 right=[TRUE] colour=null text=$read.text $text.cols[2] = $text $read.text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=1100006 $text = create custom menu column string, position=420 length=100 right=[TRUE] colour=null text=$read.text $text.cols[3] = $text add info line heading to menu: $menu, heading=$text.cols
if not size of table $table $read.text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=689 add custom menu info line to array $menu: text=$read.text else $order = create new array, size=6, elements=[SSTYPE_W_ENERGY], [SSTYPE_W_MINERALS], [SSTYPE_W_BIO], [SSTYPE_W_FOOD], [SSTYPE_W_NATURAL], [SSTYPE_W_TECH], null, null $i.order = 0 $size.order = size of array $order while $i.order < $size.order $tmp = $order[$i.order] inc $i.order =
$sorted.array = sort table keys: table=$table $size = size of array $sorted.array $added = 0 $i = 0 while $i < $size $ware = $sorted.array[$i] inc $i = $type = get maintype of ware $ware if $type == $tmp $text.cols = array alloc: size=4 $text = create custom menu column string, position=0 length=300 right=[FALSE] colour=null text=$ware $text.cols[0] = $text $ware.amt = $table.imports[$ware] if not $ware.amt $text = '-' else $text = convert number $ware.amt to string end $text = create custom menu column string, position=300 length=60 right=[TRUE] colour=null text=$text $text.cols[1] = $text $ware.amt = $table.exports[$ware] if not $ware.amt $text = '-' else $text = convert number $ware.amt to string end $text = create custom menu column string, position=360 length=60 right=[TRUE] colour=null text=$text $text.cols[2] = $text $ware.amt = $table[$ware] $text = convert number $ware.amt to string $text = create custom menu column string, position=420 length=100 right=[TRUE] colour=null text=$text $text.cols[3] = $text add custom menu info line to array $menu: text=$text.cols inc $added = end end
do if $added add info line section to menu: $menu end end
endsub
sub.DrawStations: @ $data.table = [THIS] -> call script plugin.logistics.tabledata : Menu='logistics.mainmenu' Table='docks' Network=$loaded.network.name @ $menu = [THIS] -> call script lib.cycrow.table.build : Menu=$menu Data=$data.table Name='docks' @ $data.table = [THIS] -> call script plugin.logistics.tabledata : Menu='logistics.mainmenu' Table='complex' Network=$loaded.network.name @ $menu = [THIS] -> call script lib.cycrow.table.build : Menu=$menu Data=$data.table Name='complex' @ $data.table = [THIS] -> call script plugin.logistics.tabledata : Menu='logistics.mainmenu' Table='factories' Network=$loaded.network.name @ $menu = [THIS] -> call script lib.cycrow.table.build : Menu=$menu Data=$data.table Name='factories'
$read.text = read text: page=$page.id id=4220 add custom menu heading to array $menu: title=$read.text $read.text = read text: page=$page.id id=4221 $text = sprintf: fmt='[%s]', $read.text, null, null, null, null add custom menu item to array $menu: text=$text nextinput='add.station' value=null endsub
sub.DrawShips: @ $data.table = [THIS] -> call script plugin.logistics.tabledata : Menu='logistics.mainmenu' Table='ships' Network=$loaded.network.name @ $menu = [THIS] -> call script lib.cycrow.table.build : Menu=$menu Data=$data.table Name='ships'
$read.text = read text: page=$page.id id=4220 add custom menu heading to array $menu: title=$read.text $read.text = read text: page=$page.id id=4227 $text = sprintf: fmt='[%s]', $read.text, null, null, null, null add custom menu item to array $menu: text=$text nextinput='add.ship' value=null endsub
sub.BuildMainMenu: $menu = create custom menu array
add tab to menu: $menu, text='Overview' if $current.tab == 0 OR ! $current.tab gosub sub.BuildOverview end
$read.text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=9103 add tab to menu: $menu, text=$read.text if $current.tab == 1 gosub sub.DrawStations end
$read.text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=683 add tab to menu: $menu, text=$read.text if $current.tab == 2 gosub sub.DrawShips end
set menu option: $menu, icon=17 set menu option: $menu, widthtype=[MenuWidth.Huge] set menu option: $menu, remove main header=[TRUE] set menu option: $menu, global hotkey=[Key.Identity], id='info'
$read.text = read text: page=$page.id id=4200 $callback = [Callback.TabChanged] $input = create input: id='logistics.mainmenu', dynamic menu=$menu, title=$read.text, description=$loaded.network.name, callback=$callback, update=5000ms endsub
sub.GetStationData: skip if $station $station = get global variable: name='menu.station' $data = $table.networks[$loaded.network.name]['stations'] $data = $data[$station] endsub
sub.GetWaresList: if not $table $text = '-' else $ware.count = size of table $table if not $ware.count $text = '-' else if $ware.count == 1 $key = get next key: table=$table key=null $text = sprintf: fmt='%s', $key, null, null, null, null else $array = sort table keys: table=$table $text = combine string array: $array, separator=', ' $text = sprintf: fmt='(%s) %s', $ware.count, $text, null, null, null end end endsub
sub.BuildEditStation: $station = get global variable: name='menu.station' gosub sub.GetStationData
$menu = create custom menu array gosub sub.GetPrio dec $value = $aValues = array alloc: size=5 $read.text = read text: page=9620 id=4204 $aValues[0] = $read.text $read.text = read text: page=9620 id=4205 $aValues[1] = $read.text $read.text = read text: page=9620 id=4206 $aValues[2] = $read.text $read.text = read text: page=9620 id=4207 $aValues[3] = $read.text $read.text = read text: page=9620 id=4208 $aValues[4] = $read.text $read.text = read text: page=$page.id id=4203 add value selection to menu: $menu, text=$read.text, value array=$aValues, default=$value, return id='prio', width=100 allowtabs=[TRUE]
$table = $data[2] $is.export = [FALSE] gosub sub.DrawWares
$table = $data[3] $is.export = [TRUE] gosub sub.DrawWares
*$data.table = [THIS] -> call script plugin.logistics.tabledata : Menu='station.editmenu' Table='imports' Network=$loaded.network.name Extra=$station *$menu = [THIS] -> call script lib.cycrow.table.build : Menu=$menu Data=$data.table Name='imports'
$read.text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=4203 add custom menu heading to array $menu: title=$read.text $read.text = read text: page=$page.id id=4247 $ret = create menu return value: callback, value='clear' add custom menu item to array $menu: text=$read.text returnvalue=$ret $read.text = read text: page=$page.id id=4248 $ret = create menu return value: callback, value='default' add custom menu item to array $menu: text=$read.text returnvalue=$ret
set menu option: $menu, icon=113 set menu option: $menu, widthtype=[MenuWidth.Big] set menu option: $menu, global hotkey=[Key.Identity], id='info'
$text = $station -> get name $callback = [Callback.Switch] | [Callback.TradeBarCh] $input = create input: id='station.editmenu' menu=$menu title=$text description=$loaded.network.name callback=$callback endsub
sub.DrawWares: $text.cols = array alloc: size=6 if $is.export $read.text = read text: page=$page.id id=4210 else $read.text = read text: page=$page.id id=4209 end $text = create custom menu column string, position=0 length=200 right=[FALSE] colour=null text=$read.text $text.cols[0] = $text $read.text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=1104523 $text = create custom menu column string, position=250 length=100 right=[FALSE] colour=null text=$read.text $text.cols[1] = $text $read.text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=1102519 $text = create custom menu column string, position=350 length=30 right=[TRUE] colour=null text=$read.text $text.cols[2] = $text $read.text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=1102518 $text = create custom menu column string, position=380 length=40 right=[TRUE] colour=null text=$read.text $text.cols[3] = $text $read.text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=9510 $text = create custom menu column string, position=420 length=80 right=[TRUE] colour=null text=$read.text $text.cols[4] = $text if $is.export $read.text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=1104462 else $read.text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=1104524 end $text = create custom menu column string, position=-1 length=100 right=[TRUE] colour=null text=$read.text $text.cols[5] = $text add custom menu heading to array $menu: title=$text.cols
if size of table $table $sorted.array = sort table keys: table=$table $size = size of array $sorted.array $i = 0 while $i < $size $ware = $sorted.array[$i] gosub sub.DrawWare inc $i = end end
gosub sub.GetWareTable if size of table $ware.table add section to custom menu: $menu if $is.export $read.text = read text: page=$page.id id=4223 $text = sprintf: fmt='[%s]', $read.text, null, null, null, null add custom menu item to array $menu: text=$text nextinput='add.export' value=null else $read.text = read text: page=$page.id id=4222 $text = sprintf: fmt='[%s]', $read.text, null, null, null, null add custom menu item to array $menu: text=$text nextinput='add.import' value=null end end
endsub
sub.DrawWare: $side.menu = create custom menu array $text.cols = array alloc: size=7 $text = create custom menu column string, position=1 length=250 right=[FALSE] colour=null text=$ware $text.cols[0] = $text $ware.amt = $station -> get amount of ware $ware in cargo bay $ware.max = $station -> get max amount of ware $ware that can be stored in cargo bay $value = fixed multiply and divide: $ware.amt * 100 / $ware.max $text = create custom menu string progress: width=100 progress=$value% $text = create custom menu column string, position=250 length=100 right=[FALSE] colour=null text=$text $text.cols[1] = $text $text = convert number $ware.amt to string $text2 = convert number $ware.max to string $text = sprintf: fmt='%s / %s', $text, $text2, null, null, null $text = create custom menu column string, position=255 length=100 right=[FALSE] colour=[MenuColour.Cyan] text=$text $text.cols[2] = $text $value = get transport class of ware $ware $text = get short transport class name: class=$value $read.text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=1104408 $side.text = create text for custom menu, left=$read.text, right=$text add custom menu info line to array $side.menu: text=$side.text $text = create custom menu column string, position=350 length=30 right=[TRUE] colour=null text=$text $text.cols[3] = $text $text = get volume of ware $ware $text = convert number $text to string $read.text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=9316 $side.text = create text for custom menu, left=$read.text, right=$text add custom menu info line to array $side.menu: text=$side.text $text = create custom menu column string, position=380 length=40 right=[TRUE] colour=null text=$text $text.cols[4] = $text $ware.price = get average price of ware $ware $text = convert number $ware.price to string $text = create custom menu column string, position=420 length=80 right=[TRUE] colour=null text=$text $text.cols[5] = $text
add info line section to menu: $side.menu $text = get min price of ware $ware $text = convert number $text to string $read.text = read text: page=[Page.Encyclopedia] id=21 $side.text = create text for custom menu, left=$read.text, right=$text add custom menu info line to array $side.menu: text=$side.text $text = convert number $ware.price to string $read.text = read text: page=[Page.Encyclopedia] id=22 $side.text = create text for custom menu, left=$read.text, right=$text add custom menu info line to array $side.menu: text=$side.text $text = get max price of ware $ware $text = convert number $text to string $read.text = read text: page=[Page.Encyclopedia] id=23 $side.text = create text for custom menu, left=$read.text, right=$text add custom menu info line to array $side.menu: text=$side.text
$value = $table[$ware] if $value == -1 OR ! $value $text = '-' else $text = convert number $value to string end if $is.export $read.text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=1104462 else $read.text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=1104524 end $side.text = create text for custom menu, left=$read.text, right=$text add info line section to menu: $side.menu add custom menu info line to array $side.menu: text=$side.text $text = create custom menu column string, position=-1 length=100 right=[TRUE] colour=null text=$text $text.cols[6] = $text
add info line section to menu: $side.menu $text = get ware description: ware=$ware add custom menu info line to array $side.menu: text=$text
set menu option: $side.menu, icon=29 set menu option: $side.menu, set title text=$ware set menu line option: $menu, side menu=$side.menu
$context = create context menu
$read.text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=812 add context menu entry: menu=$context, text=$read.text, icon=29, returnvalue='info', hotkey=[Key.Identity], disabled=[FALSE] add context menu separator: menu=$context $read.text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=1107 add context menu entry: menu=$context, text=$read.text, icon=66, returnvalue='delete', hotkey=null, disabled=[FALSE] $read.text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=818 add context menu global info line: menu=$context, name=$read.text, value=$ware $value = $table[$ware] $read.text = read text: page=[Page.Menus] id=1102517 if $value == -1 $text = '-' else $text = convert number $value to string end add context menu global info line: menu=$context, name=$read.text, value=$text if $is.export $ret = create new array, arguments='export', $ware, null, null, null else $ret = create new array, arguments='import', $ware, null, null, null end $ret = create menu return value: context menu, id=$ret, menu=$context, dynamic=[FALSE]
$value = $table[$ware] do if $value == -1 $value = 0 $text = sprintf: fmt='%s', $ware, null, null, null, null set menu line option: $menu, video display ware=$ware add trade bar to menu: $menu, text=$text.cols, min=0, max=$ware.max, current=$value, volume=1, used=0, return value=$ret, left text=$text, right text='%CURRENT%'
endsub
sub.GetPrio: $value = $data[1] skip if $value $value = 3 gosub sub.GetPrioText endsub
sub.GetPrioText: if $value == 1 $text = read text: page=9620 id=4204 else if $value == 2 $text = read text: page=9620 id=4205 else if $value == 3 $text = read text: page=9620 id=4206 else if $value == 4 $text = read text: page=9620 id=4207 else if $value == 5 $text = read text: page=9620 id=4208 else $text = read text: page=9620 id=4206 end endsub
sub.BuildShipMenu: $menu = create custom menu array
@ $data.table = [THIS] -> call script plugin.logistics.tabledata : Menu='ship.menu' Table='ships' Network=$loaded.network.name @ $menu = [THIS] -> call script lib.cycrow.table.build : Menu=$menu Data=$data.table Name='ships'
set menu option: $menu, icon=55 set menu option: $menu, widthtype=[MenuWidth.Huge] set menu option: $menu, remove main header=[TRUE] set menu option: $menu, global hotkey=[Key.Identity], id='info' $read.text = read text: page=6020 id=216 $input = create input: id='ship.menu' menu=$menu title=$read.text description=$loaded.network.name callback=null endsub
sub.BuildStationMenu: $menu = create custom menu array
@ $data.table = [THIS] -> call script plugin.logistics.tabledata : Menu='station.menu' Table='docks' Network=$loaded.network.name @ $menu = [THIS] -> call script lib.cycrow.table.build : Menu=$menu Data=$data.table Name='docks' @ $data.table = [THIS] -> call script plugin.logistics.tabledata : Menu='station.menu' Table='complex' Network=$loaded.network.name @ $menu = [THIS] -> call script lib.cycrow.table.build : Menu=$menu Data=$data.table Name='complex' @ $data.table = [THIS] -> call script plugin.logistics.tabledata : Menu='station.menu' Table='factories' Network=$loaded.network.name @ $menu = [THIS] -> call script lib.cycrow.table.build : Menu=$menu Data=$data.table Name='docks'
set menu option: $menu, icon=29 set menu option: $menu, widthtype=[MenuWidth.Big] set menu option: $menu, global hotkey=[Key.Identity], id='info'
$read.text = read text: page=6020 id=2011 $input = create input: id='station.menu' menu=$menu title=$read.text description=$loaded.network.name callback=null endsub
return null

comment.var: no event, must be from a hotkey, so launch the menu

line.comment: *write to player logbook: printf: type=[Log.Debug], fmt='Logistics, Obj=%s, Event=%s, Data=%s', $a.obj, $a.event, $a.data, null, null

line.comment: *$data.table = [THIS] -> call script plugin.logistics.tabledata : Menu='station.editmenu' Table='imports' Network=$loaded.network.name Extra=$station
*$menu = [THIS] -> call script lib.cycrow.table.build : Menu=$menu Data=$data.table Name='imports'

sval.val: no event, must be from a hotkey, so launch the menu
